endpoints.name: GET /v1/placeActionTypeMetadata
endpoints.description: Returns the list of available place action types for a location or country.

endpoints.name: GET /v1/{name}
endpoints.description: Gets the specified place action link.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: DELETE /v1/{name}
endpoints.description: Deletes a place action link from the specified location.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: PATCH /v1/{name}
endpoints.description: Updates the specified place action link and returns it.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: GET /v1/{parent}/placeActionLinks
endpoints.description: Lists the place action links for the specified location.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: POST /v1/{parent}/placeActionLinks
endpoints.description: Creates a place action link associated with the specified location, and returns it. The request is considered duplicate if the `parent`, `place_action_link.uri` and `place_action_link.place_action_type` are the same as a previous request.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.
